description: 人物场景生动自然，最有「人情味」。暖色插画叙事。
base_style_prompt: Warm narrative illustration style. Warm cream background (#FDF6EC), coral accent (#E17055), deep gray text (#3D3D3D). Warm-toned character illustrations in everyday life scenarios. Human-centric, emotionally resonant. Natural scenes, real-life moments, genuine warmth. Focus on people and relationships.
